hooks.command: bash -c 'SECRETS=$(git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM -z --name-only | xargs -0 grep -lnE "(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|dg-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|[A-Z_]*API_KEY\s*=\s*[\"'\'']{1}[a-zA-Z0-9]{10,})" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then echo "🚨 BLOCKED: Possible API keys found in staged files:"; echo "$SECRETS"; echo "Remove secrets and use env vars instead."; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ No secrets detected"'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */prompts/*.txt) WORDS=$(wc -w < "$FILE" | tr -d " "); if [ "$WORDS" -gt 500 ]; then echo "⚠ Prompt has $WORDS words (limit: 500). Consider trimming."; fi; if grep -qiE "^(Hello|Hi |Sure|Of course)" "$FILE"; then echo "⚠ Prompt starts with a greeting pattern. Remove preamble."; fi; if ! grep -qiE "(output rules|output format|constraints|rules)" "$FILE"; then echo "⚠ Prompt may be missing output constraint section."; fi; echo "✓ Prompt validation complete ($WORDS words)";; esac'
